title: Severe Lacerations To Head
description: This is all a bit f*cked. We should talk. A new hour from Kate on the state of the world and the world of the state. To be clear about the title... This is a show about genocide and fascism. The stuff about traumatic brain injury is there for light relief. “Kate is a countercultural force of nature, a scourge of the right and a very clever woman... I undeservedly recommend going to see any of [her shows]. You won’t be disappointed.” (Morning Star)
content_warnings: We are going to talk about capitalism
